title: Talking about my life - Boulder, Colorado 8/21

transcript.text: Like, I only, she would only talk to me when she was pissed off at me, like, when I hit Kaylee, she came after me, and she's like, she's like, you're a bad person because you hit Kaylee, you fucking asshole, or whatever.
And then would, like, storm off, and that was, like, the last time, the only time I'd ever talked to her, or she'd ever talked to me.
But anyways, yeah, the next, the next day we, um, or the next year we went into sixth grade, and then, yeah, so Demetrius, he was in my class.
And there were, like, two different classes, there was, like, Deb Cowan was the name of the teacher.
And there was, like, um, there was, and then there was another, I can't remember, I remember all this shit, there was this other, Deb Cowan's, um, assistant teacher was, oh shit, motherfucker.
